highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Ananta Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Centre:

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with its infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Around 150 students are placed in our batch. The highest salary package offered is 22 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 13.2 LPA. Recruitment can occur in any hospital as a junior resident of a department or any facility as an assistant. All students recruiting for the course have the compulsion to do internships in the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facility and infrastructure are not good as the library does not provide a book issuing facility. Wi-Fi is not enabled anywhere. Classrooms, laboratories, and demonstration rooms are poorly ventilated. Hostels are least facilitated with basic needs only, and power cuts are more often.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It's the best medical college in Udaipur and rajasamand for studies.

review_content.Placements: I am doing MBBS and there is no placement-like thing in it but yes you can do an internship or practice on your own in any hospital or medical college after completing the MBBS. As it provides the degree of RUHS and it's a government degree that is credible all across the globe. So a job is a very easy thing you can say.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi in the hostel but that's not good. Labs are there in every department and yess they fit perfectly for the requirement but the standard is not that high. Food in mess is not that good but edible. The canteen and cafeteria are there on the campus. It is a medical college so medical facilities are not a point of concern. There is a good atmosphere for sports on the campus. There is a cricket ground, basketball court, badminton court, and volleyball court of the required demands in the campus and we have the "best cricket ground" compared to any other medical college in Rajasthan.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college and students who are want to study can come here.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students were placed. The average salary package offered ranges from 1 LPA - 2 LPA. There were 150 interns in this college. MBBS and nursing courses were offered in this college, and many top-class hospitals were offered and lots of junior residents were available here for more preparation and also good PG courses offered by other colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was very good, and sports facilities were offered in this college. Classroom facilities were also very good. Wi-Fi was available in hostels, and laboratories and classrooms were very good, and one should come and study more than enough to skill their knowledge about medicine.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Ananta Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Centre.

review_content.Placements: There are no on-campus placements for MBBS students. Students get internships in the college hospital itself. Almost all the students get internships in the hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities available are not top-notch but appropriate to survive in the hostel. The food is average in taste and quality. Medical facilities are available 24x7. Sports and games are played enthusiastically.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are very helpful and cooperative. The curriculum is solely based on competency. Semester exams are easy. However, the university exams are very tough to pass.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is absolutely a nice institute.

review_content.Placements: This is a very good place for students who want to pursue their career in the field of medical sciences as a doctor. This institute will help your dreams come true through the efforts of teachers and management staff. They provide a proper environment for students to study.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is a well-established campus with well-equipped labs, fully maintained and managed classrooms with the latest technologies, Wi-Fi and a fully informative library that can be accessed by students whenever needed. Canteen, sports and games facilities are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college is absolutely recommendable.

review_content.Placements: Our batch strength is 150 students. Since the college was started in 2016, the students of the first batch are currently doing their internships. So, there are no placements till now. The college offers 2 courses, MBBS and nursing.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our hostel is not as satisfying as the amount we pay. It should provide more facilities like a common kitchen and geysers. Wi-Fi connection is very poor, and the timing should be till 10 pm.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty members in our college are highly qualified and knowledgeable. Their teaching is quite satisfying. They have a friendly interaction with students. The HODs of all 3 departments are good. The semester exams are not so tough. The pass percentage is half of the total.

description: Ananta Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Centre cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Ananta Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Centre NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 919665 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.
Ananta Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Centre MBBS cutoff 2025 was 919665 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Ananta Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Centre accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
The institute accepts admission to MBBS on the basis of NEET UG cutoff ranks, followed by Rajasthan NEET UG counselling.
In Round 1 the MBBS Cutoff 2025 was, 1059777, whereas in Round 4 the cutoff was, 919665 for the students belonging to the General AI category.
Students can refer to the table below to know more about other categories, courses, and quota cutoff data for 2025, 2024, and 2023.

reviews.review_text: The facilities available are not top-notch but appropriate to survive in the hostel. The food is average in taste and quality. Medical facilities are available 24x7. Sports and games are played enthusiastically.

reviews.review_heading: It is absolutely a nice institute.
reviews.review_text: It is a well-established campus with well-equipped labs, fully maintained and managed classrooms with the latest technologies, Wi-Fi and a fully informative library that can be accessed by students whenever needed. Canteen, sports and games facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is absolutely recommendable.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our hostel is not as satisfying as the amount we pay. It should provide more facilities like a common kitchen and geysers. Wi-Fi connection is very poor, and the timing should be till 10 pm.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has well-qualified teachers.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are well-maintained, and the furniture is already given. The room is attached with a balcony and bathrooms. Rooms are well-ventilated, and the electricity supply is good. A canteen and cafeteria are also available here. The food served in a mess is good with a lot of varieties.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has helpful and knowledgeable faculty members. It has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The lecture theatres available in the college can accomodate 250 to 300 students at a time, and it is equipped with air-conditioning facility. Wi-Fi facility is available here. Reading room and library facilities are available in the college as well as in the hostel. It has three canteens and a cafeteria. The quality of food served in a mess is good. It is a medical college, so it has all the medical facilities. It provides sports facilities like cricket, badminton, volleyball, basketball, footb...

reviews.review_heading: It provides good teachers, infrastructure is developing, most of the facilities are available.
reviews.review_text: In this college, a Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel. There are a library facility and reading room facilities. The classroom has a capacity of 200-250 students but has only 2 air-conditioners. There is a basketball court, a volleyball court, and a cricket and football field on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: I will rate our college with 7 stars out of 10 stars.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is available in our college, and it has Wi-Fi. But Wi-Fi is not available in college, and there is every lab on our campus. The library is available on the campus, and it has all books. The quality of facilities provided in our hostel is moderate, and the quality of food served is average. All sports grounds are available. Our college environment is peaceful, and the weather is very interesting around the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the dedicated and extremely helpful staff members and management.
reviews.review_text: The college provides labs for every subject like physiology, microbiology, pathology, PSM, forensic, medicine, etc. The hostel has Wi-Fi. Classrooms are well-ventilated and air-conditioned, and it has one of the top libraries in Udaipur. The mess is well-equipped and ventilated with TV, and the quality of food is also good. There is a huge ground for volleyball, cricket and football, and there is also a badminton court.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members in our college are hardworking and helpful.
reviews.review_text: Some part of the infrastructure in our college is under development, but the developed infrastructure is adorable. In the hostels, the rooms are spacious. There are 5 lecture theatres in college. Wi-Fi facility is available in both hostels and college for students and staff members.

reviews.review_heading: Very much renowned degree of RUHS beautiful environment, highly professional faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is nice but not completely built. Build-up is going on and the campus has a great playground, beautiful groups of small gardens on the entrance which are really heartwarming and pleasant. Classrooms are facilitated with AC and projectors. A big library containing all the medical books written by different authors.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is basically underdevelopment and it will be completed in 1 or 2 months ! Hostel have big rooms and all the facilities mess is big and food here is good as compared to others .

highlights.summary: WBJEE 2026 registration has begun for Sanaka Educational Trust's Group of Institutions admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Apr 5, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 24, 2026.

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
faqs.answer:
Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.
Know more about -
Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities

faqs.answer: A:    Many top international companies having presence in India hire electrical engineers and offer them handsome salary packages. Some of the top recruiters are given here:Larson & ToubroTata Electric CompaniesSterlingSchneider ElectricCrompton GreavesSiemensExide Industries LimitedMellcon Engineers
faqs.question: What are some of the top recruiters hiring Electrical Engineers?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Electronics Engineers are also recruited by the DRDO. The organisation releases notification in case of any requirement or vacancy in the pertinent discipline. The recruitement to DRDO is done on the basis of an open-recruitment process which attracts the brightest minds and experienced candidates from the country.
faqs.question: Can an Electronics Engineer get a job in DRDO?

faqs.answer: A:    Well, yes. There are a good number of job openings for BTech Electrical Engineering graduates because of the ever-growing demand for electricity by the growing population. As everything today runs on power, with technological advancements taking place every day and the focus on renewable energy and smart power grids, the need for Electrical Engineering graduates is quite high in the professional world.
faqs.question: Are there enough job openings for BTech Electrical Engineering graduates?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sanaka Educational Trust's Group of Institutions provides Full Time programs at the UG and After 10th levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Architecture & Planning, and have a fee structure of around INR 36,000 to 4,40,800. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech, B.Arch and B.Pharma. Further, the After 10th programs include After 10th Diploma.

review_content.Placements: Almost 85% students got placed through the college campusing. The highest package offered was 12 LPA for the role of FRONTEND DEVELOPER by BYJU'S. Many others companies comes to offer jobs such as TCS, INFOSIS, WIPRO, etc. With a starting package of 4 LPA. A student can expect an average package of 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides a huge campus with a lot of amenities for the students such as free Wi-Fi, swimming pool, subject wise lab, projector classrooms, gyms, playgrounds, canteen, etc. The hostel rooms are quite good as they provide both AC & NON-AC rooms. The quality of the hostel food is average. But there are several others options available such as mess and college canteen. There is 24*7 medical facility available for the students.

The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good campus with decent placement.

content.Placements: Around 70-80% of B. Pharma students got placed. The highest package is 6 LPA, average salary is around 3.5 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. Top recruiters included Cipla, Sun Pharma, and Dr. Reddy's. Internships in 60% cases, mainly in QA, QC, and production roles. It provides very good placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our B.Pharma department has smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, and a rich library. Hostels are decent with good hygiene, mess food is average, and medical aid is available 24X7. There are ample sports and recreation facilities on campus, and also in very good condition.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A nice college campus with good faculty members, placement in 2024, facilities, studies, etc.

content.Placements: About 60% of students get placed. The salary package offered is 6 LPA. Government and private companies visited our campus. They provided great opportunities for all eligible students. Indian Army also recruits students here. Approximately 70% of students got internships at Tata Motors.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides a huge campus with a lot of amenities for students such as free Wi-Fi, a swimming pool, a subject-wise lab, projectors, classrooms, a gym, a playground, a canteen, etc. Hostel rooms are quite good as they provide both air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned rooms. The quality of the hostel food is average. There are several other options available such as a mess and a college canteen. There is a 24/7 medical facility available for students.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sanaka Educational Trust's Group of Institutions Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Sanaka Educational Trust’s Group of Institutions has separate hostels for boys and girls. The food stuff served at the hostels has been acclaimed to be of a very high standard. Special food items are served on special occasions and a grand feast is arranged at the end of every month. The hotels have indoor sports facilities including table tennis, carom, volley ball, badminton, and multi-gym while the common rooms are provided with cable connection. Hostels are also equipped with broadband internet facilities and communication centers with STD/ISD and FAX services operating round the clock cater to the students' personal requirements

library.description: Sanaka Educational Trust’s Group of Institutions has a central library with a huge collection of technical books, periodicals, video films, Indian standards, general magazines and other publications related to each and every aspect of engineering and its related subjects.

reviews.review_text: The college provides a huge campus with a lot of amenities for the students such as free Wi-Fi, swimming pool, subject wise lab, projector classrooms, gyms, playgrounds, canteen, etc. The hostel rooms are quite good as they provide both AC & NON-AC rooms. The quality of the hostel food is average. But there are several others options available such as mess and college canteen. There is 24*7 medical facility available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sanaka Educational Trust's Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Modern and digital classrooms, labs, and the library are good. Wi-Fi is available 24X7. The quality of food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi, but students don't know the password. Sports and medical facilities are good, but the canteen facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: The fee structure is cheap with concerning other colleges with good academics.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a free Wi-Fi zone but it is fully not true, work is going on it. Our laboratories are good but the computers are not modified. Classrooms are good and it has single sit benches. Our library is good and it is under AICTE. There are many books in the library. The food served in the canteen is good. Hospital is also available. It has a playground, and there are two coaches for football and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college with high rate of placements.
reviews.review_text: There is a good and well-maintained laboratory for B.Pharma students. Library is quite huge. Food quality is awesome and cricket can be played in sports. I love our college although never went because of the corona.

reviews.review_heading: I would love to recommend my juniors to join this beautiful college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is really good, and everything is quite good. Most of the time, I spend time in libraries. There are many books in our library, which are not only subjective but also knowledgeable books. The facilities in the hostel and college are really good, with a canteen and medical support.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent faculty members and a lush green campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure with a lot of areas covered with lush green trees. The canteen has average quality food but all other facilities are excellent. Wardens are available 24X7 for both boys as well as girls hostels. Wi-Fi and electricity facilities are available in the hostel all the time.

reviews.review_heading: SETGOI is a college of our dreams.
reviews.review_text: For this course, we have very advanced labs with hi-tech instruments. Classrooms are huge and there are a large number of books in the library. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. As this is a private college, the hostel costs are a little bit high, but there are big rooms. The canteen serves tasty foods at a reasonable price. We have huge playgrounds to play cricket and many others games.

reviews.review_heading: Placements and infrastructure are average, but faculty members and course curriculum are good.
reviews.review_text: The canteen is unhygienic without any proper food management. Prices are too high, and the quality is also not that good. Canteen seats are very low comparing to students. You have to be very fast or wait long to get a seat. Sometimes we miss our classes for this problem. Medical facilities are very good, and students are always under the supervision of great doctors. Our college has its own hospital, so students get the best medical supervision here.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, and Wi-Fi is available in the campus ground. Classrooms are good, and the library is very good. The whole college is clean. Our college campus has a small garden and swimming pool. Computer labs are also big, and each classroom has 100 computers. Our college canteen is good, and our college also has a hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Your life will get changed after meeting new friends here.
reviews.review_text: Our college has average classroom facilities and doesn't have smart classrooms. There are no properly organised laboratories, and management is the worst. Wi-Fi facility is not provided, and classrooms are dirty. The collection of books available in the library is limited, but gradually our college management is developing its infrastructure. Overall, I have a good experience here.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average in infrastructure and not good in terms of placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good. Classrooms were good, but labs had very less equipment, so students work on the same equipment. I wasn't staying in the hostel, but I have heard in the first year that most of the students used to stay at the college hostel. After that, 10-15% of them stay only in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Try this college. Teachers are well educated and experienced.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, free Wi-Fi is provided by the college in the campus as well as in the hostel. Hostel is spacious and has the option of both AC and non AC. The quality of food in the canteen is good. Doctor is available in the campus 24*7 and College has its own playground.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: St Andrews Institute of Technology and Management (SAITM University) offers PG, UG, and diploma courses to students. These courses are provided across the Management and Engineering streams. At the UG level, the college offers BTech courses to students. BTech is provided in five specialisations, namely Computer Science & Engineering, Computer Science Technology, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Data Science, and Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering. The other UG courses include BCA and BBA.

admission_overview.description: SAITM admission 2025 are both entrance and merit-based. The institute offers UG, PG, and Diploma programmes. SAITM offers more than ten courses in the stream of Engineering, IT and Software, Medicine and Health Science among others. The admission criteria for all the courses are through SAJEE scores. All the degrees offered at SAITM are through Maharishi Dayanand University, Rohtak. The institute also accepts competitive scores for BTech, and MBA courses such as CAT, MAT, JEE Main score etc.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does St. Andrews Institute of Technology and Management accept for admission to B.Tech?
faqs.answer: St. Andrews Institute of Technology and Management offers admission to its B.Tech programme through JEE Mains entrance exam. The closing rank (in 2022) for the B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering programme was 760266 and for B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) programme is 533242.

faqs.question: Is JEE required for St. Andrews Institute of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer: No, JEE is not a explicit requirement for admission to the B.Tech branch at the St. Andrews Institute of Technology and Management.The final qualifying exam must have been passed with merit in order to be eligible for any of the courses offered at St. Andrews Institute of Technology & Management. The results of the candidates on a number of entrance exams that are given at the national, state, or institute levels, however, are what count for SAITM admission. The results of the SAJEE and other competitive exams are taken into account when providing counseling to pupils.The freshly established St. Andrews Joint Entrance Examination (SAJEE) is required for applicants to the B.Tech, BBA, BCA, and MBA programs.

placement_report.college_name: St Andrews Institute of Technology and Management Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: SAITM Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The 2024 batch comprised 269 students. Out of these, 173 were placed in BTech , MBA , and other courses in new-age job roles across diverse sectors. The overall St Andrews Institute of Technology and Management placement rate stood at 64.31%. The companies that were part of SAITM Gurgaon placements 2024 included Applore Technologies, Deloitte India, Elcamino Software Pvt. Ltd., etc.

faqs.question: What was the highest salary package offered at the time of St. Andrews Institute of Technology and Management placements?
faqs.answer: St. Andrews Institute of Technology and Management offers placements to all the students pursuing a course. According to the 2021 placement records, the highest package offered to the students was I NR 40 LPA and the the lowest package offered was INR 1.80 LPA. The list of companies who visited the campus for the hiring the students included TCS, Wipro, Accenture, and many other renowned companies. Over 150 companies participated in the drive to recruit students from the technology, management and computer appllication programs. You can read more about the placement records on the following site - https://www.shiksha.com/college/st-andrews-institute-of-technology-and-management-gurgaon-48608/placement

faqs.question: How good are D.Pharma placements at St. Andrews Institute of Technology and Management?
faqs.answer: As per the available placement information, the the highest and the lowest packages offered during St Andrews Institute of Technology and Management placements 2021 stood at INR 40 LPA and iINR 1.80 LPA. When compared to 2020 placement statistics, a growth of almost 25% was recorded in the number of recruiters that were part of 2021 placements. Some of the top recruiters that participated in SAITM Gurgaon placements 2021 included TCS, Wipro, Accenture , and many others. Note: The abovementioned data is not course-specific.

description: St Andrews Institute of Technology and Management cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the BTech program. The cutoffs are available in the form of ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates interested in taking admission at St Andrews Institute of Technology and Management can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

St Andrews Institute of Technology and Management cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 712395 and 849416 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 712395, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 754795.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 712395.

hostel_campus.college_name: St Andrews Institute of Technology and Management Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good. In this fee structure, you can take admission it is value for money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the colleges is very good. It brings many rewards to the architecture department.  The infrastructure is very good and very attractive for the students and the hostel is not very good as compared to college it has a big separate mess for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good, but the hostel life is not very good.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure was very good. The college building had many well-designed wings and attractive architecture. The architecture department was very good and well. Hostel was not good. It was very bad, but the hostel staff were very helpful.

reviews.review_heading: College life is good. The college infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms were good and fully air-conditioned. The campus provided Wi-Fi throughout. The hostel was also good, but the hostel staff sometimes behaved rudely with students. Overall, the college life was very good.

reviews.review_heading: One shot of St. Andrew's Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: SAITM has 4 buildings [A, B, C, D], C and D blocks are good, modern, facilities are available, but blocks A and B require maintenance. There are many sports available, there is also a league between hostellers [Hostel Premier League], a canteen is separate for both boys and girls, and food is okayish, like you would expect from a college mess.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with this college because of its good infrastructure and well-educated teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides many facilities like Wi-Fi, smart library, computer lab, etc. Our classrooms are so good and clean. Our hostel is also so good and provides the facilities in the hostel like good rooms, Wi-Fi facilities, mess food is available four times, and the food is good, a canteen is also available, medical conditions are so good, and sports and games are also available in the hostel like football, cricket, volleyball, badminton, etc.

reviews.review_heading: A short review of SAITM in 2025.
reviews.review_text: There are 4 blocks, the new 2 are fabulous ( C and D block), and the old 2 blocks are not that great. The library is spacious and very good, but sometimes the librarian gets rude for no reason. Wi-Fi is present across the entire college, and I am a day scholar, so I don't know very much about the hostel, but I have heard that the hostel is 3.5/5.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, and so are the teachers, and the fees are also very low.
reviews.review_text: The best thing about this college is its excellent infrastructure. There are different blocks and a big library, which also have a canteen on its roof. Classrooms are average but good, Wi-Fi is available, AC is also available, and the hostel is also good. The labs here are very good.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good infrastructure and facilities to the students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of SAITM Gurgaon is quite good and well-maintained. The college provides a Wi-Fi-enabled campus, modern computer labs, digital classrooms, and a well-stocked library with both offline and online resources. The hostel facilities are also decent, with clean rooms.

reviews.review_heading: College is good in every term, sports, hostel, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. All facilities are very good. All facilities are provided to the students of SAITM. There are two main canteens and one very big mess. For hostel students, the food quality is quite good. In sports, college is very good and supportive.

reviews.review_heading: The college is affordable and good in infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities of our college are very good. We have AC labs and advanced computers with the latest technology, and the classrooms also have AC. All over the college, Wi-Fi is available for students at no cost. Our college also has a very good hostel and a great canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, supportive environment, and events that boost learning and growth.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at the college are good, and the infrastructure is also good. They provide better quality education and labs, proper classrooms, and Wi-Fi. Hostel is also good, and the food in the hostel is average. They conduct sports day and hostel premier league. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: It offers value for money and has supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are impressive and contain digital devices like projectors and smartboards. Wi-Fi is available all over the campus, and the canteen food is very good in terms of taste. There is also a library that contains books according to your course and related subjects.

reviews.review_heading: SAITM is a good college for BCA and B.Tech students.
reviews.review_text: There are fully furnished labs and classrooms in my college. Classrooms and labs are fully AC and well-maintained. Wi-Fi and smartboards are available in classes. Hostel facilities are also good. We get sharing rooms and also only for one person. It provides both AC and non-AC rooms. The mess and cafeteria are also excellent.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of placements. It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is also good. Wi-Fi facilities are also available in our college. Tournaments and seminars are also held. Medical facilities are also available in case of emergency. The canteen and mess are also good. The food provided is of average taste.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely not bad but not so good also.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are 3 blocks for academics: A, B, and C, and the C block is the best of all. Images are also available on the internet. However, the A block has low quality, especially the washrooms, which are in very bad condition. The AC works only sometimes; mostly, only the fans are functional.

review_summary.college_name: Gautam Buddha University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my college experience and recommend Gautam Buddha University for higher studies.

content.Placements: In my course, B.Tech in computer science and engineering, placements are decent and above average. In my batch, around 40-50 percent of students have received a PPO till now from the college placement drive. The average package offered is 6 LPA, and the highest package offered is around 12 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are TCS, Wipro, HCL, and Tech Mahindra. 70 percent of students got internships during the internship scheme. Full-stack web developer, software developer, and software engineer are the top roles offered by companies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This is a semi-government college.

content.Placements: Around 75 to 80 percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package offered in this course is 7 to 8 LPA, and the minimum package is 3 to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies in this course include HCL, Wipro, TCS, and Cognizant. Around 60 to 70 percent of students get internships from our course in companies like Wipro and others. The top roles offered in this course are Software Developer and App Developer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is average. Wi-Fi does not work properly. Lab chairs are not comfortable. The library is nice, but the classrooms are not perfect. Hostels have all facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, and medical facilities. In sports, they focus on volleyball, while indoor games are not available.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A decent college to have a good college life and a studious environment.

content.Placements: Since it's B.A. English course, we all know there are no placements for such a course. No companies come to hire students from the B.A. English course because it's obvious that it's a minor course. We don't wait for companies to come and give placements. If students want a placement, then they should join professional courses like B.Tech, B.Sc., etc.
content.Infrastructure: In terms of infrastructure, it is pretty great and better than other private colleges, while being a semi-government college. There is a LAN connection in a room for high-speed internet. The food is decent to eat, so it is easy to live and enjoy here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no internship.

content.Placements: No placement is provided by the university, they just provide some sort of internships, and no permanent placements are provided to us. All the students need to do a job on their own, and the GBU team don't even provide a way to earn. Some of their internships are also free.
content.Infrastructure: All the hostels and course infrastructure are well maintained, no doubt. Hostels are well-maintained. Mess food is also good, not like other hostels, all the food given is good enough to eat. The infrastructure for courses is also well maintained. All the buildings and classes are covered with centralised AC.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Reality of Gautam Buddha university.

content.Placements: There is a GBU-ET exam that this university conducts for admission, and you can also take admission through JEE Main percentile. In GBU-ET, they ask 30 questions of each Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry at a moderate level. Average package is approximately 4-5 LPA. There are some top recruiting companies like Wipro, etc. 30-40% students get on-campus jobs, others off-campus.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of college is very much nice. Classes are equipped with AC. There are separate rooms for each boy in hostel, which have a table, chair, and almari. There are water coolers in every hostel and building. There are also gym and sports building.

faqs.answer: The biggest transition for a student is to get promoted from high school to college. Students having huge stress for their new life chapters must learn the ways to prepare before stepping into it. There are various factors to help you in getting organized and build a strong foundation for your success. It range from searching academic support to developing strong interpersonal skills. There are some activities to do in your freshman year.College is more than continuing your education. Studying is important, but other activities are equally important to experience in this modern competitive world. You have four years of your graduation to engineering college, but there are some primary things that you can do as a freshman. It will help you to find the other opportunities during the rest of your college career. Along with the opportunities, the first year of the college provides the chance to face various challenges too. Here are some significant steps to get prepared for your freshman year.1. Get involved with Extra-curricular2. Research possible college major3. Read as much as possible in freshman year4. Create a study plan in freshman year5. Meet with your guidance counselor
faqs.question: What are some helpful tips for students starting their first year at Gautam Buddha University?

admission_process.title: GBU Noida Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: GBU Noida Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

GBU admission to the UG and PG courses is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The university considers national-level tests, but preference is given toGBU-ETcandidates. GBU-ET will be conducted at the various centres throughcomputer-based tests. The date will be published in advance before the examination. Besides, candidates also need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria for admission. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below arepopular GBU coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Graduation in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)

GBU feefor different programmes ranges between INR 20,000 and INR 10.8 lakh. The university provides 50% scholarships in tuition fees for students belonging to SC/ST categories. Also, GBU has the option to avail the relaxation of 50% of the fees for students securing more than 80% in Class 12 and admitted into BTech - Civil, Electrical and Mechanical Engineering. Find below the GBU tuition fees along with the average salary for some of the programmes:
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change

In any programme, the minimum number of students should be 15 or 50% of the total seat intake allocated to that programme. Students belonging to the Sport category can avail of the 5% relaxation in the respective qualifying examination. Seat reservation will be applicable as per the Government of U.P. and Gautam Buddha University. Find below the seat intake for popular programmes at GBU Noida:
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change

Gautam Buddha University admissions usually begin inApril. Generally, the GBU admission process includes steps including the registration process, merit list release, counselling, and admission fee payment. Candidates must start by applying for the course of their choice. Below are the steps to follow to get a seat in GBU Noida:
1. Application Process:

Candidates who wish to receive admission to GBU Noida must meet the course-specific eligibility criteria and pay the required application fee (INR 1,500 for General and INR 750 for SC/ ST candidates belonging to UP).
2. Selection:

Once the registration process is over, the university evaluates the applications of the candidates. The university selects candidates for most of the courses based on GBU-ET. It is a university entrance exam conducted for admission to MBA, BTech, PhD, etc. National or state-level entrance exams such asGATE, CLAT, JEE Main, etc. are also accepted for a few courses. For programmes such as BA, MA, MSc, MTech, etc., the admissions are based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university releases the results ofGBU-ET online.
3. Admission Confirmation:

Selected candidates need to come for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to bring the specified documents for verification. After the final selection is done, candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seats at the university.
For more information about Gautam Buddha University check out the below videos:

headings.text: Steps for GBU University Admission Process 2025

courses_data.name: GBU Noida BTech Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:CBSE 12th, UP 12th, ISC, JEE Main
courses_data.description: Gautam Buddha University offers four-year BTech programme spread across eight semesters. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for GBU Noida BTech programme. The university also offers lateral entry to BTech course.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam accepted for BTech at Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Gautam Buddha University accepts JEE Main score for admission to BTech programme. The university also conducts GBU-ET for admission to BTech course. The exam is conducted in CBT mode. GBU-ET is conducted at designated centre. The date of exam and schedule is notified to candidates 15 days well in advance before the examination.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BTech at Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for Gautam Buddha University BTech programme. Candidates need to complete three years/ two years Diploma exam with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) to apply for BTech (LE). Aspirants with BSc degree or DVoc can also apply.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech in Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University provides BTech programs requiring students to have passed 10+2 with Physics & Mathematics as compulsory subjects, plus Chemistry, Biotechnology, technical vocational subject. Minimum of 45% marks & 40% for SC/ST is required in these subjects combined. Admission is based on Gautam Buddha University Entrance Test or JEE Main scores.

faqs.question: Is it compulsory to appear for the GBU entrance test?
faqs.answer: GBU admission in all UG, PG and doctoral courses is based on the GBU entrance test performance. However, candidates holding national-level test scores are also considered for admission, only if the seats remain vacant after GBU-ET.

courses_data.name: GBU Noida MA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Gautam Buddha University offers two-year MA course spread across four semesters. The university offers MA inJournalism and Mass Communication, Human Rights, Sanskrit, Public Policy and Governance, etc. The minimum requirement to apply for MA programme is graduation. The university offers direct admission to candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam for MA.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MA at Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University offers admission to MA based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Such candidates need to apply online for their course and wait for the selection confirmation. Once selected, candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Does Gautam Buddha University offer MA?
faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University offers two-year MA course divided into four semesters. The university offers MA in Journalism and Mass Communication, Sanskrit, Public Policy and Governance, etc. The minimum requirement to apply for MA programme is graduation. GBU offers direct admission to candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam for MA.

faqs.question: Can I join two programmes at Gautam Buddha University, GBU at a time?
faqs.answer: The curriculum of all its academic activities has an international and cross-cultural focus. At present, the school offers three programmes in management, which are Master in Business Administration (2-year full time), Dual Degree BBA + MBA (with existing option), B.Com (H)and Doctoral Programme.

faqs.question: Can foreign students also seek admission in GBU?
faqs.answer: Yes, the University has made its presence globally and is open for admission in all UG, PG and doctoral programmes for foreign students. Some of the countries from where the students have taken admission since GBU’s inception are: Vietnam, Cambodia, Afghanistan, South Korea, Thailand, USA, etc.

placement_data.title: Gautam Buddha University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Gautam Buddha University has released its placement brochure for 2025. As per the brochure, 75% of the engineering and management students secured placements during the Gautam Buddha University placements 2024. The highest package recorded during the placement season stood at INR 51 LPA. More than 100 companies like Wipro, Samsung, TCS, Adobe, HCL and many others were a part of the placement season.

faqs.question: Is Gautam Buddha University good for placements?
faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University (GBU) has a decent placement record. In the 2022-23 placement season, the highest package offered to a GBU student was INR 24 LPA, and the average package was INR 4.5 LPA. reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college experience and recommend Gautam Buddha University for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: It has a great and beautiful infrastructure, which is spread over 511 acres. It has facilities like a shopping complex and multiple cafes on campus. There are multiple playgrounds for different outdoor sports like cricket, football, and courts for lawn tennis. There is a separate indoor stadium for badminton, and other indoor sports are also available. Hostel provides single non-sharing and personal rooms with 24x7 electricity and internet connection through LAN. Mess food quality is good and hy...

reviews.review_heading: This is a semi-government college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is average. Wi-Fi does not work properly. Lab chairs are not comfortable. The library is nice, but the classrooms are not perfect. Hostels have all facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, and medical facilities. In sports, they focus on volleyball, while indoor games are not available.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college to have a good college life and a studious environment.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, it is pretty great and better than other private colleges, while being a semi-government college. There is a LAN connection in a room for high-speed internet. The food is decent to eat, so it is easy to live and enjoy here.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no internship.
reviews.review_text: All the hostels and course infrastructure are well maintained, no doubt. Hostels are well-maintained. Mess food is also good, not like other hostels, all the food given is good enough to eat. The infrastructure for courses is also well maintained. All the buildings and classes are covered with centralised AC.

reviews.review_heading: Reality of Gautam Buddha university.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is very much nice. Classes are equipped with AC. There are separate rooms for each boy in hostel, which have a table, chair, and almari. There are water coolers in every hostel and building. There are also gym and sports building.

reviews.review_heading: Nice College and this college is semi government .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is best Wi-Fi are also working properly benches are also comfortable library is nice but classroom is also nice neat and clean in hostel there are all facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, medical facilities are also available they are also concentrate on sport.

reviews.review_heading: A little bit expensive, but a nice college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is average. Wi-Fi is working properly, but the lab chair is not comfortable. The library is nice, but the classroom is not perfect, it's a hostel, and there are all facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, and medical facilities are also available. In sports, they concentrate on volleyball. Indore games are not available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is a little bit expensive for this course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is average. Wi-Fi is also working properly. Labs and chairs are not comfortable. The library is nice, but classrooms are not perfect. In the hostel, there are all facilities like AC and Wi-Fi. Medical facilities are also available. In sports, they concentrate on volleyball. Indoor games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is quite good and study is above average, and its study depends on students.
reviews.review_text: Gautam Buddha University campus is good and spacious, but the management of the campus is poor. All sports facilities are there: volleyball, badminton, cricket, tennis, etc. Tournaments are held for volleyball, cricket, and all. It is a very big university, so it helps the students to walk and feel relaxed.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Institute of Computer Science and Technology (ICST Varanasi)
reviews.review_heading: Placements are not very good, and the infrastructure and facilities are also average.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are not very good. They are above average. Labs, libraries, and classrooms are too big, and air conditioning is available in every class. The quality of food in the canteen and mess is good. Sports and games also take place on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Gbuian are the best in Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are also available via LAN, and the library is available for free in my college. the hostel is very well furnished, and the quality of food is very good, as a company from Gurgaon prepares food for students with the menu changing every week. Medical facilities, like a dispensary, are available in the college, and sports facilities, such as a stadium, are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Best college to take admission in CSE course for 2025.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best in our college. Our college has different buildings for all departments, as it offers many different courses. Hostels in our college are also the best among the range of colleges in Greater Noida.

reviews.review_heading: GBU is the college for GBUians.
reviews.review_text: The department is very well-maintained and furnished. Wi-Fi facility and the library are available for free. Classrooms are well-equipped, and decorum is maintained. Hostels are very well-furnished and have LAN facilities. The food is not that good, but considering the price, it is worth it. A free medical dispensary is available. Sports facilities are top-notch, and a stadium is also present.

reviews.review_heading: Gautam Buddha University review.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is the best. College has 511 acres of land. Our college is very big. We have Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms have AC. Library is also very big in every department. Classrooms are fully AC. Facilities in hostel are not good for first year. Hostel is good but for second year hostel is literally the worst you can't pee and use washrooms. Canteen and medical facilities are good. Because government institute of medical sciences hospital is our college so medical facility is good. M...

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay. In the hostel everything is good. Everyone has a separate room but there is no proper Wi-Fi. There is a LAN port and the quality of the food which we got is okay sometimes we get good goes sometimes not. Medical facilities are good. There is a nearby gym. Sports and games are good.

reviews_list.review_title: This college is very helpful for us, and it secures my future.

review_content.Placements: 65% of students are placed in our course. The average package is 3 LPA to 4 LPA. The lowest is nothing in our college but the highest package goes to 12 LPA. There is local company, and some companies have come to this college. Internship is not available in college. Some students get off campus internships. Roles offered are java developer, web developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is very friendly environment in our college. But the college canteen and park are some issues. Our classroom or labs are very comfortable so we are not having any issues with them. It is provided only for girls, not for boys so I have no idea about the hostel facility. But I know about the hostel some information is that the environment is peaceful.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: This is my journey of my college, not a review.

review_content.Placements: My batch is 2023–2026 in Bachelor of Computer. Decent percentage of students are placed from the college. The highest package is 15 LPA and the average package is 3 to 4 LPA. MNC or IT companies come to lower college. Internships are provided, but students are mostly placed in our college, not in popular companies. Coding roles are the top roles in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Nice environment in our college, especially the library and labs. I am a local guy, so I can’t take hostel or anything, but the T3 canteen is very suitable and open in nature. Food is awesome and tasty. The medical facility is very good. I went to check my body weight and the staff calculated my BMI. The staff is ordinary.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: In a simple word, my college is good for student which belongs to a middle class family.

review_content.Placements: From year 2023 when I got admission in the college. I am assured by the faculty members that you will definitely get college placement. But it's my third year, and there is no option for campus placement. As my dean said, I hope that within the next 15 to 20 days, there will be some placement opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of my college is decent. It has all the facilities that are required for the study like Wi-Fi, lab, classroom, smartrooms, and library. One more important thing is that my college provides timely awareness of all the requirements for being a good student or a good person, and they always support.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The overall experience is very good. Gaining good quality knowledge and experience.

content.Placements: There are 65 percent of students placed from our course. The average package is 3 LPA- 4 LPA. The lowest is nothing in our college, but the highest package is 12 LPA. There is a local company, and some MNCs come to this college. Internships are not available in college. Some students are off-campus interns. Roles offered are Java developer, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There is a very friendly environment in our college, but the college canteen and park are some issues, our classroom and labs are very comfortable, so we do not have any issues with them. It is provided only for girls, not for boys, so I have no idea about the hostel facility. But I know about the hostel, some information is that the environment is picturesque.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college because of the good learning skills and helpful faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are average. This college gives average placement. Few companies come and give low salary packages, but not according to the skills of students. The college does not provide internships.
content.Infrastructure: It has good infrastructure and good facilities. It consists of Wi-Fi labs with 2 labs having the maximum number of computers. It has a good mess (canteen). Air-conditioned classrooms are available in this college. It is an above-average college and good for skills development.
content.Faculty: This college has helpful teachers. They provide all the knowledge to students. This course is properly computer-based, so teachers provide good lab assessments to students and give quality education. Semester exams are very easy to pass, and out of 10 questions, we have to attempt only 5 questions.

reviews.review_heading: The overall experience is very good. Gaining good quality knowledge and experience.
reviews.review_text: There is a very friendly environment in our college, but the college canteen and park are some issues, our classroom and labs are very comfortable, so we do not have any issues with them. It is provided only for girls, not for boys, so I have no idea about the hostel facility. But I know about the hostel, some information is that the environment is picturesque.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because of the good learning skills and helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: It has good infrastructure and good facilities. It consists of Wi-Fi labs with 2 labs having the maximum number of computers. It has a good mess (canteen). Air-conditioned classrooms are available in this college. It is an above-average college and good for skills development.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very helpful for us, and it secures my future.
reviews.review_text: There is very friendly environment in our college. But the college canteen and park are some issues. Our classroom or labs are very comfortable so we are not having any issues with them. It is provided only for girls, not for boys so I have no idea about the hostel facility. But I know about the hostel some information is that the environment is peaceful.

reviews.review_heading: This is my journey of my college, not a review.
reviews.review_text: Nice environment in our college, especially the library and labs. I am a local guy, so I can’t take hostel or anything, but the T3 canteen is very suitable and open in nature. Food is awesome and tasty. The medical facility is very good. I went to check my body weight and the staff calculated my BMI. The staff is ordinary.

reviews.review_heading: In a simple word, my college is good for student which belongs to a middle class family.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of my college is decent. It has all the facilities that are required for the study like Wi-Fi, lab, classroom, smartrooms, and library. One more important thing is that my college provides timely awareness of all the requirements for being a good student or a good person, and they always support.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IET College Khandari Agra.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average, not very vast. There are 2 playgrounds where outside players play all day, so very rarely do you get a free ground. The hostel is only for girls. Boys have to stay near the college on room rent or in PG hostels, or they can also stay in private boys’ hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Placement and career growth are very bad.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are only available for girls, not for boys. Boys have to live in the nearest places to the college. Basically, boys can rent a house or stay in a PG. The infrastructure is okay. At one time, they teach almost 80-90 students in a big hall, but sometimes the voice can't reach the last bench.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about college.
reviews.review_text: My college has all the labs for research and all types of support for labs, and it has outer facilities for research, and it is a good college. I got a hostel in my first year. The hostel and mess are good, but due to personal reasons, I left the hostel and took a 2bhk flat on rent outside the college for Rs. 4500 and the electricity bill.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: I didn't avail it, but I used to go there, and everything was good. The food, accommodation, and cleanliness were good, and it was better than others in the budget. They also provided medical and Wi-Fi facilities. I got a hostel in the first year, which was good, and the mess was also good, but due to personal reasons, I left the hostel and took a 2BHK flat on rent outside the college for Rs. 4,500 plus the electricity bill.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: All the hostels are considered livable, and any normal student can survive on mess food. Apart from this, the university campus area is full of many affordable private options such as PGs, rented rooms, private hostels, and many cheap lunch homes which provide good food at nominal rates.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: I got a hostel room in the first year. The hostel was good, and the mess was also good, but due to personal reasons, I left the hostel and rented a 2BHK flat outside the college for Rs. 4,500 plus the electricity bill.

reviews.review_heading: It is providing solutions based on concerns. It is good at arranging needs.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are fitted with modern projectors, considering their frequency of usage. Only for the students of the civil department, it arranges individual desks and provides comfortable sketching of diagrams. Likewise, required facilities are arranged for all departments based on their needs.

reviews.review_heading: The college is located in the main area of the city.
reviews.review_text: The college is located in the midst of the city, so we are often stuck in traffic and delayed in reaching the college on time. Students are supposed to use the college transportation systems. The college is supported with uninterrupted power connections and Wi-Fi connections.

reviews.review_heading: Bachelor of commerce at khandari campus, Agra.
reviews.review_text: The campus would have given me tons of memories, yet it had some drawbacks. The management instantly made some decisions, finalized and implemented them immediately. Events are instantly planned and conducted by the management without giving any notice to the students for preparation.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is very good. It has a 24-hour water and electricity supply. The environment is very good. Only mess charges are paid by students every month and it is very cheap. The mess bill is around Rs. 3,000 per month and food quality is normal. The mess provides 2 types of vegetables and 1 type of dal, including chapati and price. The college focuses mostly on practical learning in clinical subjects rather than paying attention to para-clinicals and non-clinicals. The college assigns ...

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: College is awesome with great teachers and faculty.

review_content.Placements: The highest package is 6L per annum and average package is 3.5L per annum offered by top companies to the students who got good marks.
review_content.Infrastructure: As phone usage is not allowed in college so Wi-Fi not available. Labs, classroom, library are well developed and well established and organised. Canteen is good. Games area is huge and have separate playground. Medical faculty is good and have medical room.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, well educated, qualified and have good teaching experience. Teaching quality is awesome with great technique. Course have a specific industry visit so teacher makes well prepared and took student to industry visit for industry knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: One of the best colleges in central India.

review_content.Placements: I'm not sure exactly what percent of students were placed in last few years but I can say almost every one got placement. Average package in pharmacy is I think around 4-5 LPA. Last year's highest package was 8 LPA. Top companies include Cipla, Nestle, Pulsus, Zydus, Piramal, Annova, Ipca, Alembic, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has everything except Wi-Fi. Labs have all the necessary ingredients, chemical, equipments, etc. Canteen and library are also quite good. Classrooms are also good and big. I am satisfied with the infrastructure of the college and the facilities they provide.

overview_faqs.question: Is Acropolis Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Acropolis Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research is a well-known institution for B.Pharma, M.Pharma, D.Pharma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Acropolis Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research has a rating of 4.8 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.7 on campuslife, 4.9 on placements, 4.9 on faculty and 4.6 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Acropolis Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B. Pharm.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college is very nice and the campus is mind blowing.

content.Placements: In my course, above 70% of students were placed. In my course, the highest package is 25 LPA and the lowest is 4.5 LPA. Cipla and other pharmaceutical companies are the top recruiters. The top roles offered by my course are manager-level post, drug inspectors, etc. The placements are offered at top companies and also in government sectors.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good in our college. The labs are clean. The library is also good. My college class room is very nice in look; the wall paint is nice, and cleanliness is also very good. The canteen at my college is also very good. Medical facilities are also available and games and sports activities are nice too.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B. Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My college is good in teaching. My college has good placement and recently some students are placed.

content.Placements: My batch has 110 students. In this year 2023, some students have got about INR 6.95 lacs package in Nestle company. In recent year, my college has got good placements. Many companies are still coming. I hope that I get placed in some big company. My college provides various courses like B. Pharmacy, M. Pharmacy and others.
content.Infrastructure: My college has good infrastructure with a huge playground and canteen facilities are available. My college is good in teaching and the faculty is awesome. They help me a lot in various activities and also help in my assignment work. In my college, there is also a computer lab.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College is awesome with great teachers and faculty.

content.Placements: The highest package is 6L per annum and average package is 3.5L per annum offered by top companies to the students who got good marks.
content.Infrastructure: As phone usage is not allowed in college so Wi-Fi not available. Labs, classroom, library are well developed and well established and organised. Canteen is good. Games area is huge and have separate playground. Medical faculty is good and have medical room.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, well educated, qualified and have good teaching experience. Teaching quality is awesome with great technique. Course have a specific industry visit so teacher makes well prepared and took student to industry visit for industry knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: One of the best colleges in central India.

content.Placements: I'm not sure exactly what percent of students were placed in last few years but I can say almost every one got placement. Average package in pharmacy is I think around 4-5 LPA. Last year's highest package was 8 LPA. Top companies include Cipla, Nestle, Pulsus, Zydus, Piramal, Annova, Ipca, Alembic, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has everything except Wi-Fi. Labs have all the necessary ingredients, chemical, equipments, etc. Canteen and library are also quite good. Classrooms are also good and big. I am satisfied with the infrastructure of the college and the facilities they provide.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B. Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best and highly recommended.

content.Placements: Placement cell regularly provides good opportunities. They do their best for placements. Top pharma companies like Hetro, Divis, and Lupin. Around 70% of students grab the opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure with individual blocks for different departments. Labs, classrooms, library, equipment, and chemical reagents are available. There are more good facilities. We have good quality equipment and materials in the laboratory.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very highly qualified, competent, very helpful, and supportive. Faculty members are good and friendly. Students will be job-ready after graduation.

faqs.question: How can I get into Acropolis Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Acropolis Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.PharmaCandidate must have completed 10+2 or equivalent qualification with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics / Biology as optional subjects
Candidates who had passed 10+2 with grace marks in any subject can also apply provided they have scored mentioned aggregate marks excluding grace marks.
Candidates completing 10+2 with grading system, should have grades equivalent to mentioned aggregate marks.M.PharmaCandidate must have completed Graduation in Pharmacy with above mentioned aggregate marks.
 The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents.
Candidates belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh can apply with at least 50% marks.
Bachelors degree should be of minimum of four years duration and have been obtained from any AICTE approved institution or Indian University/ Institute or from a foreign Uni

college_info.intro:
IndianIHM Kolkata offers BHM programme for the duration of three years at the undergraduate level. At PG level, the institute offers MBA for the duration of two years under four specialisations. Indian Institute of Hotel Management Kolkata also offers a two-year diploma programme. Indian Institute of Hotel Management Kolkata BA, MBA and Diploma courses are offered under four specialisations each.
Candidates are selected in the below mentioned courses based on the institute-level Eligibility Test followed by Personal Interview (PI). Check some of the IndianIHM popular programmes offered at IndianIHM Kolkata in the following table:

faqs.answer: A:    The National Council of Hotel Management and Catering Technology (NCHMCT) is conducting NCHMCT JEE Counselling 2023 in online mode for BSc admissions in four rounds. NCHMCT started NCHM JEE 2023 Counselling process on Jun 9.NCHMCT JEE Round 3 Seat Allotment Results were released on Jul 20 for admission to the BSc HHA course. The last date to pay the seat acceptance fee for NCHMCT JEE Round 3 Seat Allotment was Jul 25. Also, NCHMCT JEE Round 1 Seat Allotment Results were released on Jun 15
faqs.question: What is the schedule for NCHMCT JEE 2023 Counselling for BSc admissions?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Indian Institute of Hotel Management Kolkata provides placements. the placement cell of IndianIHM conducts soft-skill training, pre-placement talks and mock-placement activities for students. In addition to this, workshops and seminars are organised by the Institute to build the personality and communication skill of students.
faqs.question: Does IndianIHM provide placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Indian Institute of Hotel Management Kolkata alumni are working in India and abroad in countries such as Italy, United Kingdom and Abu Dhabi. The top international recruiters include P&O Cruise and Fairmont.
faqs.question: Where are IndianIHM alumni placed?

faqs.answer: A:    The list of companies that visited the campus in recent past during IndianIHM placements is presented below:IndianIHM Top RecruitersMarriott HotelThe Westin KolkataRoyal Caribbean, USAThe Taj DubaiThe LeelaHyatt RegencyHotel Mikri Poli, GreeceAnelia Resort and Spa, MauritiusITC Royal BengalSheraton
