fees_and_eligibility.overview: Indian Institute of Hotel Management Kolkata offers undergraduate, postgraduate and diploma courses across stresms, including Management and Hospitality. Admission to this programme is based on merit and score based on Class 12 and graduation. Candidates can check the IndianIHM Kolkata courses and fees details in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to IndianIHM Kolkata's Diploma in Hospitality Management, aspiring students should have passed Class 10 or an equivalent from a recognised school board in any stream. The requirement ensures the presence of a basic educational background among students entering the programme. The two-year all-round course imparts practical skills and knowledge for a successful career in the wide area of Hospitality Management.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for the Diploma in Hospitality Management at IndianIHM Kolkata?

faqs.answer: A:    For UG programmes of IndianIHM Kolkata, such as Hotel Management, Hospitality Management, Hospital Management, and Travel and Tourism Management, the last pick is made according to performance in the eligibility test and a subsequent Personal Interview. Eligibility also involves passing Class 12 from any stream through a recognized board, with each course having special seat intakes specified.
faqs.question: How much percentage is required for IIHM?

faqs.answer: A:    Reputable educational institution, International Institute of Hospitality Management (IIHM), provides undergraduate hospitality management programmes. Campus-specific requirements differ for admission to the Bachelor of Hospitality Management (BHM) programme. At the Kolkata campus, however, passing the Class 12 exam with English as one of the subjects or earning 50% in Class 10 and an equivalent exam is the minimum eligibility requirement for the BHM with 60%. Remember that other considerations, like the candidate's profile, preference, and seat availability, are also taken into account, so fulfilling these requirements does not ensure admission.
faqs.question: Can I get admission in IIHM Kolkata for BHM with 60% in Class 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    The students applying to IndianIHM Kolkata's Masters/MBA in Hospitality Management must hold a graduation degree of at least 50% marks in any field from an affiliated university. The stringent eligibility rules guarantee that only a superior caliber of students with high grades get enrolled under the program. IndianIHM Kolkata offers a two-year course consisting of a very specific curriculum that exposes students to required knowledge as well as competencies to combat efficiently in today's fast-working industry of Hospitality Management.
faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for pursuing a Masters/MBA in Hospitality Management?

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Indian Institute of Hotel Management, Kolkata.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2.50 LPA. Top recruiting companies are ITC, Taj Group, Hyatt, and Mariott. Around 50% of students got internships in this course. Top roles offered are culinary chef, food and beverage service staff member, bakery chef, housekeeping staff, front-office staff, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college does not provide hostel and mess facilities. The food quality is average. Medical facilities are available. A first-aid box is also available in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor Degree in Hotel Management (BHM) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has helpful teachers.

review_content.Placements: You get a few options like front-office, F&B service, housekeeping, production, and bakery. You can choose your interest and can give importance to that particular department. You have various stages in each department. The highest earning is in F&B service.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure has changed a lot. There are 2 buildings on our campus now. We don't have Wi-Fi service. There is a library, but you must pay for it. We cannot use the library as it is too small. It is used for back-office purposes. There is a hostel too. Canteen is not available. Students cannot leave the college premises.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor Degree in Hotel Management (BHM) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Disappointing in many ways. The only good thing is the friends you make in the process.

content.Placements: I'm currently in the final year, and of course, around 80–85% of our batchmates have been given internships. But, when it comes to jobs, so far only about 30–35% of the batch has been placed. The average package for freshers right now is approximately Rs. 15,000–20,000 per month. JW Marriott and Hyatt are the top recruiting hotel brands. Mostly freshers join as associates.
content.Infrastructure: I’m visibly upset with the infrastructure, especially with the amount of fee they’re charging. The AC in classrooms is often broken, there are very few classrooms, and there’s no Wi-Fi facility. The library hardly has 100 books. Labs are okay but not top-notch. There is no canteen for students, no mess or hostel, and no playground or anything.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor Degree in Hotel Management (BHM) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best college in Kolkata for hotel management.

content.Placements: Here, 100% placement is given by the college, from many more opportunities like respective 5-stars and also from outside India placements. There are many opportunities to grow your career and life to a 100% hike, and exciting ones like cruises and deluxe properties.
content.Infrastructure: All classrooms are provided with air conditioning, and all labs are cleaned. All departments have comfort for each and every student. There is a very comfy and good environment in this college, and very cool faculty members and styling to teach all departments.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Hospitality Management - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Indian Institute of Hotel Management, Kolkata.

content.Placements: Almost 100% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2.50 LPA. Top recruiting companies are ITC, Taj Group, Hyatt, and Mariott. Around 50% of students got internships in this course. Top roles offered are culinary chef, food and beverage service staff member, bakery chef, housekeeping staff, front-office staff, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college does not provide hostel and mess facilities. The food quality is average. Medical facilities are available. A first-aid box is also available in this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor Degree in Hotel Management (BHM) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has helpful teachers.

content.Placements: You get a few options like front-office, F&B service, housekeeping, production, and bakery. You can choose your interest and can give importance to that particular department. You have various stages in each department. The highest earning is in F&B service.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure has changed a lot. There are 2 buildings on our campus now. We don't have Wi-Fi service. There is a library, but you must pay for it. We cannot use the library as it is too small. It is used for back-office purposes. There is a hostel too. Canteen is not available. Students cannot leave the college premises.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors in Hospital Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with college as it is worth money.

content.Placements: More than 80% of students get placements. The highest salary package is Rs.63,000 per month, the average salary package is Rs.35,000 per month, and the lowest salary package is Rs.20,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Apollo, Fortis, and Tata medical. More than 80% of students get internships at Tata medical and Apollo. HOD, HR, Floor head, etc., are the roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: We are provided with all the facilities like labs, fully air-conditioned classrooms, computer labs, and a library. Medical kit for labs is provided. Hostels are average and clean. Wi-Fi facilities, medical facilities, and extracurricular activities are provided.

admission_process.title: Indian Institute of Hotel Management Kolkata Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Indian IHM Kolkata admissions 2025 are ongoing. The college offers admission to courses at UG, PG and Diploma level. IndianIHM Kolkata admissions are merit-based, leading to a Personal Interview. Shortlisted candidates undergo document verification, and successful aspirants confirm admission by paying the course fee within the stipulated time. The application process atIndianIHM Kolkatais conducted in online/offline modes. Candidates can register and appear for the exam on the official website

IndianIHM Kolkata offers UG, PG and Diploma courses in Management and Hospitality. Admission to this programme is based on merit and score based on Class 12 and graduation. Check below the eligibility, fee and selection criteria for theIndianIHM Kolkata courseadmissions 2025:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Merit-Based
IndianIHM Kolkata course admissions 2025 for all courses are done based on Merit. Check below the complete IndianIHM Kolkata admission process:Step 1: Application
The mode of application is online/offline. Candidates must register online or take the application form and then fill out and submit the application form.
Step 2: Selection Round
Admission to the programme at IndianIHM Kolkata is done based on merit. Candidates are admitted based on their past academic merit of Class 10/12/graduation for respective courses.
Step 3: Final Admission
Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants must pay acourse feeto confirm their seat in the college.

courses_data.name: IIHM Kolkata MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: IIHM Kolkata offers  MBA Hospital Management course for a duration of 2 years. The course provides training in healthcare administration, policy, operations, and finance. Graduates are equipped to efficiently manage and lead healthcare institutions. It also offers a Master’s/MBA in Hospitality Management.

faqs.question: What is the latest cutoff information for MBA at IIHM Kolkata?
faqs.answer: To get into this prestigious Indian Institute of Hotel Management the very first thing that you have to met the eligibility criteria . Then a E-CHAT entrance test is conducted every year i.e. Electronic Common Hospitality Admission Test.The cut off is changing every year but I can give you a rough idea That if you score minimum 40% in this test then your are going to get into this prestigious College.Thanks for connecting keep studying. Have a great day

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for pursuing a Masters/MBA in Hospitality Management?
faqs.answer: The students applying to IndianIHM Kolkata's Masters/MBA in Hospitality Management must hold a graduation degree of at least 50% marks in any field from an affiliated university. The stringent eligibility rules guarantee that only a superior caliber of students with high grades get enrolled under the program. IndianIHM Kolkata offers a two-year course consisting of a very specific curriculum that exposes students to required knowledge as well as competencies to combat efficiently in today's fast

faqs.question: What qualifications are required to pursue a Masters/MBA in Hospital Management at IndianIHM Kolkata?
faqs.answer: To be able to apply for the Masters/MBA in Hospital Management at IIHM Kolkata, one should have a graduation degree with 50% marks in any subject from a recognised college. The strict academic requirement ensures that the students coming into the course are well grounded. The programme, designed to impart total education in healthcare administration, policy, operations, and finance, spans across two years of duration.

courses_data.name: IIHM After 10th Diploma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: IIHM  Kolkata offers several After 10th diploma courses. These include a two-year Diploma in Hospitality Management that cover Hotel Management, Customer Service, Account Management, and Travel/Tour Management. The programme gives knowledge in Hotel and Hospital Management, focusing on practical skills and successful careers in the hospitality industry.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for the Diploma in Hospitality Management at IndianIHM Kolkata?
faqs.answer: For admission to IndianIHM Kolkata's Diploma in Hospitality Management, aspiring students should have passed Class 10 or an equivalent from a recognised school board in any stream. The requirement ensures the presence of a basic educational background among students entering the programme. The two-year all-round course imparts practical skills and knowledge for a successful career in the wide area of Hospitality Management.

faqs.question: How much percentage is required for IIHM?
faqs.answer: For UG programmes of IndianIHM Kolkata, such as Hotel Management, Hospitality Management, Hospital Management, and Travel and Tourism Management, the last pick is made according to performance in the eligibility test and a subsequent Personal Interview. Eligibility also involves passing Class 12 from any stream through a recognized board, with each course having special seat intakes specified.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in IIHM Kolkata for BHM with 60% in Class 12th?
faqs.answer: Reputable educational institution, International Institute of Hospitality Management (IIHM), provides undergraduate hospitality management programmes. Campus-specific requirements differ for admission to the Bachelor of Hospitality Management (BHM) programme. At the Kolkata campus, however, passing the Class 12 exam with English as one of the subjects or earning 50% in Class 10 and an equivalent exam is the minimum eligibility requirement for the BHM with 60%. Remember that other considerations, like the candidate's profile, preference, and seat availability, are also taken into account, so fulfilling these requirements does not ensure admission.

reviews.review_heading: Disappointing in many ways. The only good thing is the friends you make in the process.
reviews.review_text: I’m visibly upset with the infrastructure, especially with the amount of fee they’re charging. The AC in classrooms is often broken, there are very few classrooms, and there’s no Wi-Fi facility. The library hardly has 100 books. Labs are okay but not top-notch. There is no canteen for students, no mess or hostel, and no playground or anything.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in Kolkata for hotel management.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms are provided with air conditioning, and all labs are cleaned. All departments have comfort for each and every student. There is a very comfy and good environment in this college, and very cool faculty members and styling to teach all departments.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indian Institute of Hotel Management, Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not provide hostel and mess facilities. The food quality is average. Medical facilities are available. A first-aid box is also available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has helpful teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure has changed a lot. There are 2 buildings on our campus now. We don't have Wi-Fi service. There is a library, but you must pay for it. We cannot use the library as it is too small. It is used for back-office purposes. There is a hostel too. Canteen is not available. Students cannot leave the college premises.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with college as it is worth money.
reviews.review_text: We are provided with all the facilities like labs, fully air-conditioned classrooms, computer labs, and a library. Medical kit for labs is provided. Hostels are average and clean. Wi-Fi facilities, medical facilities, and extracurricular activities are provided.

reviews.review_heading: I like this course and the college.
reviews.review_text: At first, this is the clearest college in Salt Lake. The classroom is also very clean, the college provides us with Wi-Fi, and air-conditioners for all time. There are also many labs here. Our college has a very big playground and their foods are very good. The medical services are also very good.

reviews.review_heading: The teachers are highly qualified.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms were very big and comfortable. Every classroom in our college have air conditioner. We don't have Wi-Fi facilities all the time. Wi-Fi is available e only on computer labs. Our college have a great library but I don't have the need to go there so I don't know about it that much. I don't have to live in the hostel. So I don't know about that either. Our college didn't have any canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are helpful. The college provides good infrastructure and good internships.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are air-conditioned. The college provides facilities like library, labs, etc. The college provides medical facilities. Food served to the students is good. We can play games at our college. I like our college.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and Vibrant Placement opportunity.
reviews.review_text: In case of Infrastructure, Indian Institute of Hotel management is the best college. Computer lab equipped with Cutting edge technology, Front office lab providing 5 star hotel exposure, F&B service lab giving privilege to the students to get 5 star world-class level exposure and Kitchen practical is like awesome. Nice hostel facility and wi-Fi available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has one of the good campuses with excellent faculty members.
reviews.review_text: We are provided with various kinds of labs like production lab, computer lab, housekeeping lab, F&B lab, etc. The hygiene standard is at its best level. We are also provided with medical facilities. They make sure that we are participating in events, so they conduct many events.

reviews.review_heading: Join INDIAN INSTITUTE OF HOTEL MANAGEMENT for a great career in Hotel Management.
reviews.review_text: There are a lot of facilities available in the college for all the students to have best of knowledge and experience like Front office lab, F&B lab, food production lab ( Kitchen and bakery), housekeeping lab. Library where we can read books and issue them as well. I have not used the hostel as I have my house in Kolkata but as I have heard from my friends and classmates they said that the food is good and the hostel is also clean and comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: Review of IIHM Kolkata - Indian Institute of Hotel Management.
reviews.review_text: Our course infrastructure is good. The college is very much familiar, and the best part of this college is our director mam MS Nabanita Kar is like a mother and our principal Mr DJ Goes. They both and faculty members are the biggest supporters.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with 100% placement.
reviews.review_text: We have classroom labs and a library also. The classrooms are air conditioned. Labs are also very good. Sometimes college arrange medical camps for students. College don't coffee sports & game facilities. We don't have cantene in college. Hostels room are very good in quality.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, faculty, and excellent placements.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is located in the IT hub of Kolkata known as Salt Lake City, so it is easily accessible. The campus is modestly big and equipped with well-built air-conditioned classes and lecture rooms with projection screens for better understanding. The campus has four laboratories, a food and beverage production lab, which includes a basic kitchen and a bakery, a food and beverage service lab which is a modular bar cum restaurant to give the students a better understanding of F&B service....

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, facilities and placements.
reviews.review_text: There are A/C classrooms, highly equipped labs for production, service, front office and housekeeping. The separate hostels are available for boys and girls. Good quality food is served in hostels for 2 times a day. The college bus service is available to travel from the hostels.

There is no age bar for admission in law college in West Bengal.

review_summary.college_name: Vidyasagar University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: If you have many options and no financial problem, you can go to another option.

content.Placements: 40 percent of students got placed from my course. No package given, only a salary of Rs. 12000 per month. No top company hires from our college. A physiotherapist has a great role but no role in our lives. Our college could not provide any placement. Our internship does not give any salary.
content.Infrastructure: There is a library, labs, and Wi-Fi, but only for teachers. You can use the library as a student, labs are used only for practical time. There are no facilities in the hostel, hotels are used only by hospital staff and nurses. There is a canteen with only tea and coffee.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is so good and meritorious college, and teachers are so friendly.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of students are placed. The highest package is 4 LPA and the lowest is 1 LPA, but if a student is meritorious, he/she can secure good packages. Top recruiting companies are TCS and HONDA. Almost 30% of students get internships in various companies. Developer is the most famous role.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is included in computer labs, and classrooms are clean. We have two libraries: one is the departmental library and the other is the central library. The canteen is good but a little expensive. Hostels are neat and clean and maintain rules and regulations. The college sponsors an annual sports day.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Vidyasagar University, Midnapore, West Bengal.

content.Learning Experience: Intern training for us started from the final year by various professional trainers from corporates. For supporting courses, all kinds of resources are readily prepared and delivered to us for studying.
content.Placements: Conduent, Bajaj Finance, Kotak Life Insurance, and other banking companies are the leading companies that may be involved in the hiring process of our department. The average package offered may start from 3.2 LPA.
content.Faculty: Teachers usually used to tease the students instead of appraising us. But they are phenomenal in the area of teaching, pushing the students to achieve good grades in a short period by providing continuous practice.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Finance - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty.

content.Placements: People specialized in Marketing are getting placed very quickly, but other majors like finance, HR, and data analytics are struggling a little bit. Marketing special students are getting placed very quickly. All the students will get a mandatory Summer Internship Project and Live Projects in different companies.
content.Infrastructure: The study rooms are really good with AC, Wi-Fi, and projectors. Library is quite big. Lots of books and daily newspapers. The canteen is small with just a coffee machine. You have to pay for your coffee. There is no hostel for the college, you have to arrange PG on your own.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My point of view on this college.

content.Placements: The university is very good. Basically, the university placement facility is very low, few students are placed for this course. The highest salary package is 1.8 LPA per annum, and the lowest salary package is 1 LPA per annum. No one got an internship for this course.
content.Infrastructure: The university has good infrastructure. The college provides many things, like a canteen, library, and lab. All important books are available in the college library, and the classrooms are neat and clean. The university also provides playing areas for cricket, football, volleyball, etc.

admission_overview.title: Vidyasagar University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Vidyasagar University admission is open. Admission to various UG and PG courses is both entrance and merit-based. The university offers various UG, PG, diploma, and Doctoral level courses such as BSc, BA, BCA, MA, MSc, MCA, etc., in the streams of Law, Education, Science, and Arts. Vidyasagar University has 78 affiliated colleges that offer UG, PG, and research courses across numerous specialisations. For a few courses such as MCA and MBA, students must qualify for some entrance exam accepted by the college. Candidates who want to get admitted to courses running in the colleges/ institutes affiliated with Vidyasagar University must fill out the application form on the concerned college/ institute website. Students can also pursue distance education from the Directorate of Distance Education VU. Candidates applying at DDE VU must note that the admissions are on a first-come, first-served basis.

Candidates must fill out the application inonline modeby visiting the university's official website. The applicants have to fill in the form with their details, and academic details and upload the scanned copy of all the mark sheets & certificates, photos, and signatures. The university releases its merit lists of the shortlisted candidates for various courses. Once the application form is submitted, it will be scrutinized and shortlisted based on the eligibility criteria, academic performance, valid national-level exam score, etc.

nirf.description:
Vidyasagar University has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'University' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for Vidyasagar University indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Vidyasagar University's rank is #151, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been noticed that in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Vidyasagar University's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.review_heading: If you have many options and no financial problem, you can go to another option.
reviews.review_text: There is a library, labs, and Wi-Fi, but only for teachers. You can use the library as a student, labs are used only for practical time. There are no facilities in the hostel, hotels are used only by hospital staff and nurses. There is a canteen with only tea and coffee.

reviews.review_heading: It is so good and meritorious college, and teachers are so friendly.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is included in computer labs, and classrooms are clean. We have two libraries: one is the departmental library and the other is the central library. The canteen is good but a little expensive. Hostels are neat and clean and maintain rules and regulations. The college sponsors an annual sports day.

reviews.review_heading: Vidyasagar University, Midnapore, West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Intern training for us started from the final year by various professional trainers from corporates. For supporting courses, all kinds of resources are readily prepared and delivered to us for studying.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: The study rooms are really good with AC, Wi-Fi, and projectors. Library is quite big. Lots of books and daily newspapers. The canteen is small with just a coffee machine. You have to pay for your coffee. There is no hostel for the college, you have to arrange PG on your own.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College:

faqs.answer: A:    Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College is a well-known institution for PG Diploma, MD, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College has course specializations in Anaesthesia, Pathology, ENT, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Orthopaedics, Radiology, Psychiatry, Pulmonary Medicine, Community Medicine, Biochemistry, General Medicine, Microbiology, Pediatrics, Physiology, Anatomy, Ophthalmology, General Surgery.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College?

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college and provides the best education, so I recommend everyone take it.

review_content.Placements: Our college is one of the best colleges in Maharashtra. In our college, a batch of 200 students is selected through NEET. We don't have a package as a doctor, but recently one of our passed-out students did the surgery on spina bifida; he holds the title of the first surgeon to do this surgery.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel's facilities are good. We have a batch of 200 students, so we have to share a room between four people, but its accommodation capacity is only two people. Food in a mess is good, but it is not a government mess; it is a private mess, and we have to pay monthly for it. We have a ground, and our seniors conduct matches of cricket, basketball, kho, and football.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Dr. Vaishampayan memorial government medical college.

review_content.Placements: The placements are good here. The civil hospital provides an internship for one year where we get good clinical exposure. Many students from our campus have secured PG seats at AIIMS and other top institutes in the country. The internship provided here is very comparable to those at top colleges in Maharashtra.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is well equipped with all the necessary facilities. The library is up to date with the latest versions of authors. A Wi-Fi facility is not available for students as such. There are 5 canteens on campus: 1 in the college, 3 in the hospital, and 1 in the hostel campus. The food is okay.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with faculty members of college, facilities are well.

review_content.Placements: Percentage of students placed is 80%. The highest package offered is in MD medicine. The lowest is in MD radiology and average in MD biochemistry. Percentage of students who got internship 100%. Top roles offered in my college are MD radiology, MD dermatology, MD medicine, MS.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for course are labs, classrooms, library, but no Wi-Fi. Qualities of facilities in the hostel are good; food available in mess is dissatisfying; medical facilities, sports and games facilities are above average.

overview_faqs.question: Is Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College is a renowned institution offering PG Diploma, MD, MS, MBBS. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College boasts an impressive review rating of 4.11 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.89 for Campus Life, 4.44 for Placements, 4.22 for Faculty, and 3.44 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Dr Vaishampayan Memorial Government Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This college is a gem in all aspects.

content.Placements: Since it's a government medical college, all the students get to do their paid internships after the final year, after which they either work in some hospital or start preparing for the PG entrance. You don't have to worry about placements when you are in the medical field.
content.Infrastructure: The lecture halls are well ventilated, can accommodate all 200 students, and are well-equipped with projectors and whiteboards. The main halls even have air conditioning. The college has library, canteen, labs, and basically everything. Talking about the hostel, the rooms we got are triple occupancy rooms having fans and since the weather is too hot, we're allowed to install our own air coolers in our rooms (but with permission). Each hostel has a common reading room. There are common washrooms on each floor. The hostel campus has a lot of halls for various activities and sports grounds for cricket, volleyball, basketball, etc.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely a very good medical college with good faculty .

content.Placements: I am a first-year MBBS student and in a batch of 200 students, 30 are from the all-India quota and 170 are from the state quota. After 4.5 years of course, an internship was provided by the college. In a first-year course, the total number of subjects is three, namely anatomy, physiology and biochemistry.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is 60 years old so the infrastructure is not very good, and the hostel campus is also old. Canteen and reading room are available on the hostel campus and a library is present on the college campus. A total of three mess is present. Large ground present. All subject labs are available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college and provides the best education, so I recommend everyone take it.

content.Placements: Our college is one of the best colleges in Maharashtra. In our college, a batch of 200 students is selected through NEET. We don't have a package as a doctor, but recently one of our passed-out students did the surgery on spina bifida; he holds the title of the first surgeon to do this surgery.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel's facilities are good. We have a batch of 200 students, so we have to share a room between four people, but its accommodation capacity is only two people. Food in a mess is good, but it is not a government mess; it is a private mess, and we have to pay monthly for it. We have a ground, and our seniors conduct matches of cricket, basketball, kho, and football.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dr. Vaishampayan memorial government medical college.

content.Placements: The placements are good here. The civil hospital provides an internship for one year where we get good clinical exposure. Many students from our campus have secured PG seats at AIIMS and other top institutes in the country. The internship provided here is very comparable to those at top colleges in Maharashtra.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is well equipped with all the necessary facilities. The library is up to date with the latest versions of authors. A Wi-Fi facility is not available for students as such. There are 5 canteens on campus: 1 in the college, 3 in the hospital, and 1 in the hostel campus. The food is okay.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with faculty members of college, facilities are well.

content.Placements: Percentage of students placed is 80%. The highest package offered is in MD medicine. The lowest is in MD radiology and average in MD biochemistry. Percentage of students who got internship 100%. Top roles offered in my college are MD radiology, MD dermatology, MD medicine, MS.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for course are labs, classrooms, library, but no Wi-Fi. Qualities of facilities in the hostel are good; food available in mess is dissatisfying; medical facilities, sports and games facilities are above average.

faqs.answer: Different reasons for flunking nursing classes are so numerous, yet unique to each and every person. Some of main causes that normally lead to one experiencing academic difficulties in nursing classes are:Difficulty understanding concepts: nursing programs are demanding, and it is genuinely tough to grasp very complicated medical concepts, procedures, and pharmacology.Clinical performance problems: These can be concerns for students who are experiencing complications with clinical skills or interpersonal communications.Poor study habits: One of most important study skills in any nursing program. A student who does not have proper study habits, time management, or organizational skills might not manage to keep pace according to coursework.Overwhelmed by workload: workload, in particular, can be intense in nursing programs, leaving students overwhelmed as to what to learn and acquire, complete as assignments, and spend in clinical hours.

college_info.intro: The ABSMARI by Abhinav Bindra offers BPT and MPT along with various specialisations of it. The Institute offers sub-domains within the specialisations of Orthopaedics, Sports, Neuro-Sciences and Cardiopulmonary Sciences. Several courses involve academic, clinical and research components within the curriculum of 2 years. The admission process is merit-based and is carried out by the international faculty as well as the domestic faculty. All the courses are designed to provide education and training to prepare Physiotherapists in the primary, secondary and tertiary level healthcare system. To know more about the ABSMARI popular programmes, check out the table given below:

admission_process.title: ABSMARI Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Abhinav Bindra Sports Medicine and Research Institute admission 2025 is completely merit-based. Candidates are offered direct admission to BPT and MPT courses. These courses are offered under the affiliation ofUtkal University. ABSMARI admissions are offered based on candidates' past academic merit obtained in exams held at Class 12 and UG level. Moreover,Abhinav Bindra Sports Medicine and Research Instituteapplication process is conducted in online mode only. Read on the following article for more details around Abhinav Bindra Sports Medicine and Research Institute admissions.

Admission toAbhinav Bindra Sports Medicine and Research Institute coursesare offered based on a set of educational standards by the college. Candidates must meet the basic eligibility requirements of the programme they apply for. Check below the detailed course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for Abhinav Bindra Sports Medicine and Research Institute course admission 2025:
- UG degree in Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) with minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised university
- Candidates must also 6 months rotatory internship after the completing graduation
The detailed steps for Abhinav Bindra Sports Medicine and Research Institute admission process are as follows:
Step 1: Application Process

The application process at Abhinav Bindra Sports Medicine and Research Institute is completely online. For admission to UG/ PG courses, candidates must visit the college's official website and fill an online application form with details, including Personal and Academic information of applicants.
Step 2: Selection Rounds
Abhinav Bindra Sports Medicine and Research Institute admissions are completely merit-based. Candidates are admitted based on the past academic merit of Class 12/ graduation.
Step 3: Final Admission
After the completion of all the selection rounds, the selected candidates must pay a certain amount of fee to book their seats.

review_content.Placements: 1. No placements are available 2. Students can get jobs in hospitals on their own. 3. Students can get 20000 salary after completion of course. 4. review_content.Infrastructure: 1. our college has good lab facilities with lot of equipment in good condition and classrooms are nice and teaching in projectors for better understanding. Our college has library working from morning 8 to night 8. 2. Hostel is nice two numbers for room, food is adjustable, medical facility is available 24 hours. Sports and games are given important role.

Not just this, it has also been rated 4.2 on campuslife, 3.7 on placements, 4.7 on faculty and 4.5 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Government Dental College, RIMS, Kadapa Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied, and faculty members are good but need to be changed some. However, they are helpful.

content.Placements: About 80% of the students got placed from our college. Our college is under government, but the college fee is approximately Rs. 12,000, while the hostel fee is Rs. 7,000. The mess fee is Rs. 2,500 per month. None of the companies visits our college for placements. Our college works hard and provides us with high internships, and the stipend is offered only by Andhra Pradesh government. After UG, we pursue PG.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good here but not up to the mark, and there will be dirty in some places. However, labs are well-equipped, and the outpatient flow to the college is good so that we learn much work. The quality of the hostel is somewhat bad, and the food is available in the outside mess. The canteen is small, and medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college, and I am highly satisfied.

content.Placements: Students should score an average of 70% of marks in their academics to get placed. Most of the students secured PG seats after completion of UG course. Many conferences are conducted in college for the overall development of the student. All the students got an internship and got a scholarship after every year in UG.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good, and the campus is huge and lush green. The library is very peaceful, and all the departments are equipped With labs. There is a playground for cricket, volleyball, football, and shuttle court are provided in both boys and girls hostels. There are 24 hours of free supply of Ro mineral water.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Government dental college kadapa.

content.Placements: 1. No placements are available 2. Students can get jobs in hospitals on their own. 3. Students can get 20000 salary after completion of course. 4. They can treat patients. 6. All students get internship in our college 100 percent. At that time they can earn nearly 15000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: 1. our college has good lab facilities with lot of equipment in good condition and classrooms are nice and teaching in projectors for better understanding. Our college has library working from morning 8 to night 8. 2. Hostel is nice two numbers for room, food is adjustable, medical facility is available 24 hours. Sports and games are given important role.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure is very excellent in my college.

content.Placements: Majority students are girls than boys in my college, faculty and staff are present time to time. Patients come to my college daily minimum 30 members. So it's easy to study cases. So it's easily to study different cases. So my college is best dental college in Andhra Pradesh.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was excellent in my college. Wi-Fi available, labs are excellent, classrooms are majority filling with 100s of students, library present. In library the books are arranged in the form of department wise so it can easily to take books for required subject.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Extremely good no government college can match us.

content.Placements: 1) To get into course we have to clear the NEET UG exam entrance 2) salary depend upon our daily working hours the highest salary is infinate no the lowest salary We can earn by serving people 3) top medical hospital can recruiting job or we may self earn by our own hospital maintainece 4) after bds-UG course if we are interested we can go higher studies like PG 5) we are studying in government institution No fee package 6) we have to do 1year of internship in our studied or any other BDS college to complete the course In medical field no company is mentioned.

highlights.summary: Sarala Birla University Ranchi admissions 2025-26 are open for Diploma, UG and PG courses. Interested students can check and apply for their desired courses by visiting the official university's website

college_info.intro:
Sarala Birla University offers more than 25 programmes across 12 Schools on campus. Sarala Birla University is known for its flagship BTech, MSc, and MBA programmes. The course duration varies from 1 year to 5 years, depending on the course chosen by the candidate. Sarala Birla University offers postgraduate courses such as MBA, MTech, MSc and many more in the disciplines of Engineering & Computer Sciences, Humanities & Linguistics, Commerce & Business Management, Legal Studies, Pharmacy, and Yoga & Naturopathy. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Sarala Birla University and their respective eligibility and fees:
Check out the following video on Sarala Birla University BCA review:

placements.overview: Sarala Birla University has concluded the 2024 placements for BTech, MBA, BCA, and other courses. The highest package offered was INR 16 LPA, and the average package stood at INR 5 LPA. The placement rate recorded was 80%. In addition to this, over 110 companies offered jobs to the eligible students. The Training & Placement cell at Sarala Birla University facilitates the process of placement of students passing out from the University, besides collaborating with leading organisations in setting up internship and training programs for students. The list of top recruiters included Aditya Birla Fashion & Retail, Aditya Birla Capital, Aditya Birla Insulators, Grasim Industries Limited, Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), Ernst & Young, Dell Technologies, HCL Technologies, Barclays, Wipro, etc. The key highlights of Sarala Birla University placements 2024 are tabulated below:

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Loved in first year but not in later years

faqs.answer: A:    The SBU Ranchi placement process is elaborated below:Invitation and Initiation: Invitations are extended to prospective companies by T&P Cell. Companies send the Job Description to T&P Cell and eligibility criteria is designed. Forms and CVs are collected from Students.In-campus/ Onine Placement Drive: Company Conducts Pre-Placement Talk. Company organises selection process, it may consists of- Skill / Aptitude / Psychomatric Assestment, etc. Final list of the selected students is announce

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, but you have to take an entrance test called as SBU entrance test (Sarala Birla University Entrance test) and you have to qualify in it. All the admissions are strictly on merit. So you have take the entrance test and after getting valid score you can join in Sarala Birla University.
faqs.question: Can I join Sarala Birla University without CUET?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates seeking admission to the BPharma programme of SBU must fulfil the Sarala Birla University BPharma eligibility criteria. The eligibility criteria require applicants to have passed Class 12 from any recognised board in India with a minimum aggregate of 50% in English and Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Mathematics (PCM/PCB). A relaxation of 5% in the minimum eligibility requirement is provided to the candidates belonging to the SC/ST/PwD category.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Pharma at Sarala Birla University?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, candidates can change the programme with certain terms and conditions at Sarala Birla University. Aspirants can only change the programme once before a specific date (to be announced by the University) subject to the availability of seats in that respective Programme. However, B.Tech and Polytechnic Diploma students can switch their specialization/ branch before the commencement of the third semester subject to approval by a competent authority.

review_summary.college_name: Sarala Birla University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. (Hons.) in Accounts - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Nice college. It gives great opportunities.

content.Placements: Every 9 out of 10 students get placed every year from B.Com (Hons.) in Accounts. The average package is around 4–5 LPA. Companies like TCS, TATA Motors, Reliance, etc., come as recruiters. We also have internship programmes that help us learn practical skills. Different firms approach us for internships.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in SBU, Ranchi are wonderful, but there is still some place for improvement. There’s often a network problem inside the campus, and Wi-Fi is not available throughout. Apart from this, everything is great. Hostels run very properly and provide good food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. (Hons.) in Accounts - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Sarala Birla University offers good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and decent placements.

content.Placements: The placement record of SBU has been quite promising in recent years. Around 75%-80% of students across courses like B.Tech, BCA, MBA, and BBA manage to secure jobs through campus recruitment. The highest package reported has gone up to 16 LPA-25 LPA, while the average package usually stays around 5 LPA-6 LPA. The lowest packages are generally in the 3 LPA-3.5 LPA range. These figures vary depending on the course and batch, but overall, placements are considered good compared to many private universities in the region.
content.Infrastructure: The university has good infrastructure with Wi-Fi, library, and classrooms. Hostel rooms are spacious and clean, and medical help is available. Mess food could be better, but it is manageable. Sports facilities are decent, giving students enough options for recreation.

The highest package offered is about 16 LPA, and the average package is around 5 LPA. Some of the top companies that visit the campus include TCS, Wipro, Deloitte, Accenture, HCL, EY, Tata Power, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university is modern and well-maintained. The campus is spread over 60 acres and has smart classrooms, computer and Science labs, a well-stocked library, medical support, and transportation services. Hostel facilities are also available - girls have hostels inside the campus and boys have hostels nearby. The hostels are safe, but some students feel the food and water services can be improved.

admission_process.title: Sarala Birla University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: TheSarala Birla University admission processconsist of three simple steps, they are Registration, Shortlisting and Result & Admission offer. Before applying, students have to check the eligibility first. Eligible students can then apply online or offline. The Sarala Birla University admission process is as given below:
SBU Application Process

The application forms are released on the official website of SBU. Qualified students must fill theSBU application formsbefore the deadline. The application fee is INR 1,000 to INR 2,000. The application can also be purchased offline by directly walking-in to the university's admission fees.
Selection Process

Admission to most of the SBU courses is merit-based. Students are shortlisted based on marks in the qualifying exam. The university also conducts an entrance test for some programmes, such as PhD. Those with valid scores in other accepted tests are exempted from appearing for the in-house test.
Admission Confirmation
Shortlisted candidates are required to pay theSarala Birla University feesand appear for the verification of documents to confirm their admission.

faqs.answer: Sarala Birla University feesare inclusive of various components, such as tuition fees, registration fees, application fees, caution money, development fees, and more. Three out of the seven components are payable only one time and the rest of the components are paid in each semester. During the admission process candidates are required to pay the registration fees to confirm their seat. Interested candidates can check out the below table for fees of popular SBU courses:Course NameTotal Tuition FeeBTechINR 3.7 lakh-INR 6.4 lakhMTechINR 2.1 lakhMBA/PGDMINR 5.2 lakhBScINR 66,000 - INR 1.1 lakhMScINR 44,000Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Can I change the programme after admission at Sarala Birla University?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can change the programme with certain terms and conditions at Sarala Birla University. Aspirants can only change the programme once before a specific date (to be announced by the University) subject to the availability of seats in that respective Programme. However, B.Tech and Polytechnic Diploma students can switch their specialization/ branch before the commencement of the third semester subject to approval by a competent authority.

faqs.question: What is the last date for Sarla Birla University admission?
faqs.answer: Sarla Birla University  admissions will open online. Till now, no schedule has been released by the university. Once the application portal is live, candidates can apply online for their preferred course.Sarala Birla University admissionis a mix of both entrance and merit-based. Students can pursue various undergraduate and postgraduate courses across multiple specialisations at the university. Additionally, the university also offers doctorate, Diploma and certificate courses.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Pharma at Sarala Birla University?
faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to the BPharma programme of SBU must fulfil theSarala Birla University BPharma eligibility criteria. The eligibility criteria require applicants to have passed Class 12 from any recognised board in India with a minimum aggregate of 50% in English and Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Mathematics (PCM/PCB). A relaxation of 5% in the minimum eligibility requirement is provided to the candidates belonging to the SC/ST/PwD category.

It organizes seminars and PDP lectures to make students ready for their industry experience. The University has concluded its placement highlights for various programs like BTech , MBA , BCom and others. Out of the 697 students a total of 421 students secured placements. The highest and average package offered to students duringSarala Birla University, Ranchi placements was INR 9 LPA and INR 3.9 LPA , respectively. Deloitte, Accenture, TCS, Intellipaat were a part of the 2025 placement drive.

facilities: UG degree marksheet & Certificate - for PG courses
PG degree marksheet & Certificate - for PhD courses

labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Physics Lab

reviews.review_heading: Nice college. It gives great opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in SBU, Ranchi are wonderful, but there is still some place for improvement. There’s often a network problem inside the campus, and Wi-Fi is not available throughout. Apart from this, everything is great. Hostels run very properly and provide good food.

reviews.review_heading: Sarala Birla University offers good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The university has good infrastructure with Wi-Fi, library, and classrooms. Hostel rooms are spacious and clean, and medical help is available. Mess food could be better, but it is manageable. Sports facilities are decent, giving students enough options for recreation.

reviews.review_heading: A great college in Ranchi, Jharkhand.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are really good. We have a separate library where we can find all the course-related books. The hostel facilities are very great, we've got Wi-Fi, laundry, water supply, warden Ma'ams are great with us, they are just like family, we had nothing to worry about, it was just like our second home. The food is great, hygienic, and tasty. There is an activity room in our hostel where you can find all indoor games and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: All the things are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, with labs, classrooms equipped with digital boards, and a library. Hostel facilities are average. The quality of food is average to good, with the canteen food being particularly good. Medical facilities, sports, and games are also average.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for LL.B. College. The campus is very nice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is modern and well-maintained. The campus is spread over 60 acres and has smart classrooms, computer and Science labs, a well-stocked library, medical support, and transportation services. Hostel facilities are also available - girls have hostels inside the campus and boys have hostels nearby. The hostels are safe, but some students feel the food and water services can be improved.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the university.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very well in its place. Birla Group at its place has a very good infrastructure and a very wide campus. Campus is highly satisfying and the facilities are also very good that are being provided to the students and faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: Best infrastructure facilities with pleasant surroundings.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in my college is outstanding. It is huge and environment friendly as it has greenery all around. The surroundings are also so quite and pleasant. Classrooms are not so huge but acceptable. It has library, sports room, computer labs, and many other labs for the science students. Hostel facility is also quite good. The food from the canteen and mess is fresh and tastes good. It has medical facilities available and also provides sports facilities but can enhance in this field.

reviews.review_heading: BVA at SBU empowers artists and helps change the perception of art careers.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious and clean, with basic tools for art students. Wi-Fi and the library are decent. Hostel rooms are well-maintained and secure. Mess food is average. Medical help and sports facilities are available. The environment is calm and supportive.

reviews.review_heading: Students got jobs from this college in 2015. I have a good experience here.
reviews.review_text: The lab facility is good. All types of machines and other objects are available for all courses. Every classroom has an LED, and monitor for studying, and also a projector. In the library, the system is good for studying alone silently with arrangements too.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2024 and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are excellent, no doubt. In the mess, we have Wi-Fi. Every single classroom is perfect, and library is also so good. All facilities are excellent in hostel. Rooms are AC and non-AC, the food which are given in the mess and canteen is in a good amount. Perfect college for students and a good environment.

reviews.review_heading: I will not advise anyone to take admission in this college. Personally, I am dissatisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not up to the mark and is not maintained. It is mainly not in use by the students. The library does not have sufficient books. Management is also not good. Hostels are also hygienic. There is a mess on the campus. It said that Wi-Fi is for students, but in reality, it is not a Wi-Fi-enabled campus, and neither is it for students. Only the authority has access to Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Little dissatisfied with attitude but provides a better job recommendation.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are well-equipped with a library, modern labs, and big hostel accommodation. The quality of the food is above average and sports and games competitions are done on a regular basis about 4-5 in a month. Many big shots are also invited in the programs held by this college.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and good canteen.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. The hostel is fabulous with 24/7 electricity. There is a hot water facility in the winter. Canteen and mess are just amazing, the food quality is top-notch. It is hygienic, you'll love the taste, overall, it's value for money. You should try.

reviews.review_heading: The college website doesn't work properly. Food quality is top-notch.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. We have access to labs. Every room has a smart board and a projector. There is a 24/7 electricity supply, and we have purified water, either cold or hot, to choose from. The quality and hygiene of the mess and canteen food are top-notch.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite well. SBU has the best infrastructure in Ranchi. It provides Wi-Fi and classrooms have a digital board. The library is also there with Wi-Fi and books for all departments. We can also access online journals and Manuptra for law students.

college_info.college_name: Sarala Birla University

data.description: Sarala Birla University is a self-financed private university aiming to foster excellence in education, research, and innovation. The Sarala Birla University is driven by its dedicated faculty members, fostering an environment that contributes to the holistic development of individuals and society. The Faculty members at Sarala Birla University instill a robust foundation for the students that cultivates ethical values, leadership and entrepreneurship skills among students. They are committed to delivering quality education across various disciplines, including Engineering & Computer Sciences , Commerce & Management, Humanities & Social Sciences, Pharmacy , Law, Journalism & Mass Communication, Applied Science, Yogic Sciences & Naturopathy, and Art, Culture, & Sports.

review_content.Placements: The placement ratio of our college is average. The average salary package offered by companies to students is 2 LPA. Students can also get placements from off-campus. Some companies like Anmol Pharma, etc., visit the college. The role offered to students is a pharmacist. They can go for higher studies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is average. The ground is small in this college. It has Wi-Fi. The capacity of each classroom is 100 students. There is no hostel facility provided in the college to students. There are many hostels present nearby 2 kilometers away. Anyone can easily get a hostel at a good price.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average in Mahatma Gandhi College of Pharmaceutical Sciences. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. review_content.Infrastructure: Mahatma Gandhi College of Pharmaceutical Sciences has facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. It does not provide hostel facilities to students. This is the reason students dislike the college.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members at Mahatma Gandhi College of Pharmaceutical Sciences are very helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. overview_faqs.question: Is Mahatma Gandhi College of Pharmaceutical Sciences a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Mahatma Gandhi College of Pharmaceutical Sciences is a well-known institution for M.Pharma, D.Pharma, B.Pharma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Mahatma Gandhi College of Pharmaceutical Sciences has a rating of 3.7 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.7 on campuslife, 3.6 on placements, 3.9 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Mahatma Gandhi College of Pharmaceutical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the teachers.

content.Placements: The placements are not provided by the college. The courses are not for any kind of placements but most of the students got good jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Firstly when I saw the picture of the college, I thought that there were no kind of facilities but guess what is almost every kind of facility is provided to the students also with no upper charges. The food in the canteen is always fresh also with proper hygiene.
content.Faculty: Teachers are qualified and knowledgeable also their teaching quality is superb. They treat students like their own sons and daughters. In my initial year, I don't understand the teachers but they always support me. Semester exams are not very tough; mostly, they are practical. The pass percentage is 78% in 2022 year.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: MGCPS college life with teachers.

content.Placements: My seniors got good job offers from companies. It does not provide many placements. I remember the highest salary package offered is 20 LPA, and it is so good, but I want more. Some renowned companies like Carewell Pharma, Jaipur Pharmaceuticals, etc., visit the college to provide placements with good salary packages.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are big compared to the ratio of students. Every classroom is occupied with a camera and decent amount of seats. There are other facilities like a cafeteria, garden for relaxing, RO water, etc., for students. Washrooms remain cleaned.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Pharmacy College of Jaipur.

content.Placements: The placement ratio of our college is average. The average salary package offered by companies to students is 2 LPA. Students can also get placements from off-campus. Some companies like Anmol Pharma, etc., visit the college. The role offered to students is a pharmacist. They can go for higher studies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is average. The ground is small in this college. It has Wi-Fi. The capacity of each classroom is 100 students. There is no hostel facility provided in the college to students. There are many hostels present nearby 2 kilometers away. Anyone can easily get a hostel at a good price.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My experience at Mahatma Gandhi College of Pharmaceutical Sciences.

content.Placements: Placements are average in Mahatma Gandhi College of Pharmaceutical Sciences. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Around 20% of students get placed each year. But in this college, students are not dependent on college placements.
content.Infrastructure: Mahatma Gandhi College of Pharmaceutical Sciences has facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. It does not provide hostel facilities to students. This is the reason students dislike the college.
content.Faculty: Faculty members at Mahatma Gandhi College of Pharmaceutical Sciences are very helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality of the faculty is very good and supportive for students. Semester exams in the college are not difficult but helpful. So these qualities are good at this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure and faculty members are really good.

content.Placements: As for placements, I haven't reached that stage yet, but I have shared what I know based on what I've heard.
content.Infrastructure: Canteen is good. Lab facilities are available.
content.Faculty: This course is of 4 years, consisting of 8 semesters. Each semester includes 3 internal exams and one final exam conducted by the university. Faculty members are good and I like them the most. They know how to interact with students. They assign many projects to students.

college_info.college_name: Manipal Institute of Regenerative Medicine, Bengaluru, MAHE

highlights.summary:
Manipal Institute of Regenerative Medicine, Bengaluru, MAHE, also known as Manipal Institute of Regenerative Medicine, is an institute. Established in 2007, it is located in Bangalore, Karnataka. The institute offers 4 courses in total, including M.Sc. The 3 specialisations provided by the Manipal Institute of Regenerative Medicine include Biology, Immunology, Neuroscience. Additionally, the institute offers PG courses, delivering Degree to the students.

Manipal Institute of Regenerative Medicine placements are decent, when compared with other institutes. The Average median salary offered by Manipal Institute of Regenerative Medicine is INR 11,75,000. Considering fees as an important decision-making factor, the average fees to be paid in the institute is INR 5,94,000. Manipal Institute of Regenerative Medicine, Bengaluru, MAHE courses are listed in a total of 2 streams, including Medicine & Health Sciences and Science. Furthermore, Manipal Institute of Regenerative Medicine, Bengaluru, MAHE Bangalore, Karnataka courses are taught in Full Time mode.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, HSNCB's Dr. L. H. Hiranandani College of Pharmacy offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from stream like Medicine & Health Sciences. College offers B.Pharma courses at the UG level. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Students are dissatisfied with placements of this college. Overall teaching and teachers are good.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% of the students got placed mostly in companies Cognizant, Inventia, etc., but our college didn't put much efforts to place students. The salary package offered is 1.5-2.5 LPA. Most of the students applied for higher studies in India and abroad.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is not available for students, but classrooms, lab and library are excellent. The hostel is available as almost all students are residential. The canteen facility is good, and various indoor games and outdoor sports matches are conducted here. The medical facility is available. The infrastructure is good here having proper classrooms for all the four years. There are different labs for all subjects. Our college has a sports room, boys and girls common room.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with the overall college campus and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: There are good placement facilities available in the college, and also the pharma companies come here to choose and hire the best students. There is one separate placement council which is available for placements and internships. The placement cell is also there for the placement facilities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good as it is built with the Hiranandani mindset and his own personal designation. There is no lift in the building which is the con. The classroom design and labs are designed perfectly with the light and ventilation as concerned.

individual_reviews.title: The college is good overall in Thane. You can say, teaching-wise and placement-wise.

content.Placements: Placements are good; the average package you can expect is 15-18k. Top recruiting companies include Cipla, Medlife, and some other companies. 10-20 percent of students are placed by the college placement, and some others also get good internships from outside the college.
content.Infrastructure: Labs have enough equipment and apparatus, and classrooms are good. Library facilities are also good; all course-related books are provided by the college. A sports room is available; there is no personal canteen for the college. The canteen is there but in CHM campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good faculty members and our principal is very friendly with everyone.

content.Placements: All students get placed in our college. Companies like Equity, Wellness Forever, Artiligence Healthcare, etc., are hiring students. The average salary offered is Rs.20,000 to Rs.30,000 per month. Around 75-80% of students who apply for jobs get placed. Top roles offered are medical representative, analytics, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a big library, study room, and computer labs but needs improvement. The food served in the canteen is good. All other medical and sports facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Students are dissatisfied with placements of this college. Overall teaching and teachers are good.

content.Placements: Around 50% of the students got placed mostly in companies Cognizant, Inventia, etc., but our college didn't put much efforts to place students. The salary package offered is 1.5-2.5 LPA. Most of the students applied for higher studies in India and abroad.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is not available for students, but classrooms, lab and library are excellent. The hostel is available as almost all students are residential. The canteen facility is good, and various indoor games and outdoor sports matches are conducted here. The medical facility is available. The infrastructure is good here having proper classrooms for all the four years. There are different labs for all subjects. Our college has a sports room, boys and girls common room.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the overall college campus and faculty members.

content.Placements: There are good placement facilities available in the college, and also the pharma companies come here to choose and hire the best students. There is one separate placement council which is available for placements and internships. The placement cell is also there for the placement facilities.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good as it is built with the Hiranandani mindset and his own personal designation. There is no lift in the building which is the con. The classroom design and labs are designed perfectly with the light and ventilation as concerned.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and infrastructure

content.Placements: The placements had started with our year. I remember around 15 people getting placed in companies like Lupin and Abbott which had come to the college to hire students. Most of the students were preparing for their master's and hence were not really interested in looking for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The college had no Wi-Fi. However, the classrooms were very spacious and the library had all the books which the students needed. The highlight of our college was our labs which had all the new and modern instruments. The college used to conduct annual sports day and supported the students who wanted to take part in RX tournament (inter-collegiate tournament).

reviews.review_text:
The labs were average.
The library is a little congested but good. 
There is no AC in the classrooms and fans are not efficient, especially in the summers. The collection in the library is good.
Washrooms are not hygienic to use, especially for women.
There is a three-floor building with no lift.
There are no facilities for handicapped people. The college has horrible washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: College is great ..faculty is great.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities provided are great . Wifi are provided at every floor. All necessary equipments are provided in the laboratories and the library also provides all pharmacopoeias and all required books. Classrooms are well maintained and clean .
Food available in the canteen is also of good quality ..There's no hostel facility available here.

review_content.Placements: I am from the diploma batch of 2018-20 from X-ray and imaging technology. But IMA result came in 2021 because exams were postponed due to COVID. I would rate 3 because our college provides the lowest number of placements in our batch. Due to the COVID pandemic, hospitals are not hiring freshers. Students from our batch get an internship in hospitals like BLK Hospital, Moolchand Hospital, Kalra Hospital, Jaypee Hospital, etc. A junior X-ray technician role is offered to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi facility is available here. There are many labs as per courses like X-ray lab, OT lab, dialysis lab, IT lab, and MLT lab. Classrooms are good and equipped with a projector. The canteen serves basic food for students. Our college provides a badminton court behind the campus.
